title: valeriana officinalis subsp. collina
intro: Valeriana officinalis subsp. collina, also known as valerian grass or wild valerian, is a subspecies of the valerian plant (Valeriana officinalis) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include sedative and anxiolytic effects, making it a popular natural remedy for insomnia, anxiety, and restlessness. The health benefits of Valeriana officinalis subsp. collina include improving sleep quality, reducing stress and anxiety, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
